title: 3010 production status on soundtrack before delay
display_title: 3010 production status on soundtrack before delay
wikitext:
[]: 3.0+1.0 production status on soundtrack before delay             Quote Post by Thesufferingpumpkin » Mon Sep 07, 2020 6:50 pm Working in the radio business im very lucky to work in the same building as Catherine Bott who I spoke to in January/February time, the lucky singer is one of the solo operatic singers on the 3.0+1.0 soundtrack, she confirmed this to me, maintain professionalism between my colleagues I did not be too noisy about the soundtrack but I did find out that the music will be epic and also that in March the soundtrack was almost complete but needed a few more things recording and then overdubs. The rebuild soundtracks have all been recorded at abbey road in London. Trust me this is a fact. And when lockdown occurred in March in the U.K. the studio was shut down, and with it the soundtrack remained incomplete which is one of the reasons why the delay for the film had to happen, currently the studio is open again as of July but it’s been busy and packed with different sessions for different things all with social distancing in place. I do believe the soundtrack has begun production again but it’s going at a slower pace, this is hinted at from shiros lack of twitter posts regarding recording sessions.

[]: Re: 3.0+1.0 production status on soundtrack before delay             Quote Post by Blockio » Mon Sep 07, 2020 7:27 pm Not to step on your toes or anything, but what you are saying is either a blatant lie, or a blatant breach of a lot of NDAs and ground for a hefty lawsuit. Either way, not something I would post on a public forum

[]: Re: 3.0+1.0 production status on soundtrack before delay             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Mon Sep 07, 2020 9:22 pm I thought it was already known/public knowledge that the music for Shin Eva wasn't completely finished, and that Sagisu's instrumentalists couldn't play together during quarantine.

[]: Re: 3.0+1.0 production status on soundtrack before delay             Quote Post by Thesufferingpumpkin » Tue Sep 08, 2020 2:57 am Not a breach when shiro puts it out on his twitter.

[]: Re: 3.0+1.0 production status on soundtrack before delay             Quote Post by robersora » Tue Sep 08, 2020 6:23 am He basically just confirmed what is already more or less public knowledge, also I doubt this lady would carelessly spill something she isn't allowed to say. Either way, thanks for the info!
